'''Haangok''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] thief who was responsible for stealing various transports from the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] and later stayed in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The Commerce Guild awarded a reward of 4,000 credits on Haangok's capture and 2,000 credits on his death. The [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] encountered the Nikto while hunting down [[Jervis Gloom]] on a viewing platform in the Uscru entertainment district. The Mandalorian managed to defeat Haangok in a brief fight and claim the bounties.

{{Char-stub}}
